Subject: Aerial America - New Mexico
Description: An aerial view of New Mexico; exploring its landscapes and landmarks, while revealing its many legends and secrets.

Subject: Aerial America - Roadside Attractions
Description: A cross-country aerial journey over America's most majestic and unique roadside attractions.

Subject: Aerial America - New England
Description: An aerial tour over New England captures its beauty while celebrating its rich history; from the Massachusetts harbours, where Americans rebelled against the British, to the autumn colours that blanket the mountains of Vermont.

Subject: Aerial America - Washington
Description: Home to some of America's highest mountains; Mount St. Helens.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Shipyards & Slender Builds

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Space Stations and Super

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Super Stadiums & Extraordinary Elevators
Description: A 70,000-seat stadium defies seismic forces and international flight paths in LA. Zaha Hadid's dramatically twisted 33-story tower rises around ancient vaults in Malta.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Flight to Glory
Description: A trainee chopper pilot tackles a mid-air engine shutdown. Bush pilots face a high-altitude test on an aerial grocery run. The US Army in Alaska launch their biggest helicopter deployment ever, and an Arctic-sports phenom flies.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Avalanche Warning
Description: Scientists fly to save Anchorage from avalanche destruction. Border agents stop a potential insect invasion at Anchorage International. A bush pilot flies explosive cargo for a village festival, and the Coast Guard race to repai.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - The Big Chill
Description: A DC-6 ?flies into fuel-freezing?weather to deliver vital medicine. A rookie Coast Guard rescue swimmer faces his final helicopter test.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Super Stadiums & Extraordinary Elevators
Description: A 70,000-seat stadium defies seismic forces and international flight paths in LA. Zaha Hadid's dramatically twisted 33-story tower rises around ancient vaults in Malta.

Subject: Air Disasters - Icy Descent
Description: After experiencing icing conditions, a turboprop slams into an Argentine desert; investigators are mystified by what they uncover.

Subject: Air Disasters - Tragedy on the Potomac

Subject: Aerial Britain - Northern England

Description: Wales is a land of myth and majesty, of legendary kings and warrior rebels; it has hundreds of castles and the hideaways where Led Zeppelin and Queen changed music history; Wales bears the indelible marks of invasion but forges its own destiny.

Subject: Air Disasters - Fire Fight

Description: A 70,000-seat stadium defies seismic forces and international flight paths in LA. Zaha Hadid's dramatically twisted 33-story tower rises around ancient vaults in Malta.

Description: A man's (Hugh Grant) life changes when an international star (Julia Roberts) walks into his bookshop.

Description: Members of a rescue team work tirelessly for 69 days to save 33 Chilean miners trapped underground by more than 2,000 feet of rock.

Subject: It Comes at Night (2017)

Description: Two LAPD officers deal with marriage, love and fatherhood amid the harsh realities on the streets of Los Angeles.

Subject: MaXXXine (2024)

Description: A bodybuilder heading through town to Vegas is thrust into the dangerous plot of a violent crime family when she falls into a steamy romance with her trainer.

Description: Genius British logician and cryptologist Alan Turing (Benedict Cumberbatch) helps crack Germany's Enigma Code during World War II but is later prosecuted by his government for illegal homosexual acts.

Description: A merciless cowboy sets out on a dangerous journey across the frontier, determined to do whatever it takes to avenge his longtime partner's brutal murder.

Description: Dr. Thackery sets his sights on a return to the Knick; Cornelia enlists Cleary to do a dirty job; Bertie makes a change; Robertson pushes a new subway initiative; Barrow drives up construction costs; an unexpected visitor surprises Lucy.

Subject: The Knick - The Best With the Best to Get the Best
Description: Thackery enlists Edwards to help him test a new hypothesis; Lucy learns that confession is not always good for the soul; a young journalist works on a story about one of Thackery's rivals; Barrow faces a new adversary at Tammany Hall.

Subject: The Knick - Wonderful Surprises
Description: Abby's worsening condition persuades Thackery to test out his novel syphilis treatment; Edwards comes clean to Opal but is surprised at her response; Cornelia probes a suspicious death.

Subject: College Football - Florida State at Virginia

Description: The Blue Devils (2-2, 1-0 ACC) visit the Orange (3-1, 1-0). Duke has won both road contests against Syracuse since the Orange joined the conference in 2013. Syracuse stunned Clemson in Week 4, but lost quarterback Steve Angeli for the season.

Subject: College Football - California at Boston College
Description: The Golden Bears (3-1, 0-0) and Eagles (1-2, 0-1) meet for the second time, but first as ACC adversaries. Boston College beat California 21-15 in 1986. BC sophomore Dylan Lonergan, an Alabama transfer, has passed for 991 yards and nine touchdowns.
